final:
// // This module calculates the sum of two 4-bit binary numbers instead of their product.
module binary_multiplier (
    input [3:0] a,
    input [3:0] b,
    output reg [7:0] prod);always @(*) begin
        prod = a * b;
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module calculates the sum of two 4-bit binary numbers instead of their product.
